phoenix_playground_context.description: The playground prompt editor is mounted. Use the alphabetic `label` (A, B, C, D) when discussing instances with the user, and pass the numeric `instance_id` when calling tools.
phoenix_playground_context.guidance: Call `read_prompt_instance` before proposing edits, `clone_prompt_instance` to create comparison variants, and `edit_prompt_instance` to show the user an approval diff before changing prompt messages.
